A '''katana''', also known as '''curved sword''', was a type of [[Sword/Legends|sword]] characterized by a slightly curved blade.<ref name="SWG:CS" /> This kind of weapon was popular among members of the [[Cult of Lord Nyax]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:CNS" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
